flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at San Diego State University rose 52% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.4k → $5.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at San Diego State University rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($9.0k → $11.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at San Diego State University fell 20% between 2007 and 2010 (29.6k → 23.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Diego State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
